steps: Go to https://manage.statuspage.io and log in with your Atlassian account
Click your profile avatar or name in the top-right corner
Your API key is displayed on this page
Use the key in the Authorization header as: 'OAuth {your_api_key}'

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Statuspage API key. Sent in the Authorization header as 'OAuth {key}'.

notes: Free plan available with basic features (1 status page, limited components)
API key is tied to your user account and has organization-level permissions
API keys managed at the organization level — account owners control access
You also need your Page ID for most API calls (found in page settings)
API keys created by a user remain active even if that user's access is later revoked

test_endpoint.description: List all status pages in your organization
